reviews.name: Doug Walters
reviews.text: Sprinkler Medic’s team always do a great job.  They are on time, professional and great to work with.   Highly recommend them for all sprinkler work, maintenance and installation.

reviews.name: Richard Roth
reviews.text: Technicians were very friendly and professional completing our Spring startup process.

reviews.name: Phyllis Cox
reviews.text: This company is outstanding. Originally we called them to fix our very messed up sprinkler system. They did a great job! After that we now have them come twice a year to winterize and then to turn on and check system in the spring. Always show up and are prompt. Customer service is the best from office to service techs.

reviews.name: Stephanie Stone
reviews.text: Been using Sprinkler Medic for a few years now and we’ve been pleased. Good pricing too!

reviews.name: Michael O'Neill
reviews.text: Chandler and his coworker were terrific today! In addition to turning on and checking my system out; they took the time to adjust the sprinkler head that cover my flower beds to assure the best coverage position for them. Their efforts were greatly appreciated!

reviews.name: Barry Anderson
reviews.text: Sprinkler Medic always on time and professional

reviews.name: Wayne S.
reviews.text: Excellent and friendly service. Used Sprinkler Medic several times and have never been disappointed.

reviews.name: Ray Vaughn
reviews.text: Colton did a great job.  I’ve used Sprinkler Medic for years and trust their work!

reviews.name: Geoffrey Embrey
reviews.text: Outside Josh himself, Gareth Duvall is hands down the best most friendly and knowledgeable technician I have ever had in the 10 years using your service. If he stays with the company, would like him to be my technician every time both my son Skyler and I need your service!

reviews.name: Lydia Edwards
reviews.text: I have been a loyal customer of Sprinkler Medic for several years, and I can’t recommend them enough! Their service is always punctual, professional, and reliable. The team is incredibly knowledgeable and consistently goes above and beyond to ensure everything is working perfectly. If you’re looking for a trustworthy sprinkler service, look no further!

reviews.name: Beth Turner
reviews.text: Chandler and his work associate ( I forgot his name) did an amazing job this morning! Thank you so much for taking the time to listen and address my concerns about changing some of the sprinklers so now all my plants and trees are being watered 😀 …

reviews.name: Andy Franzo Jr.
reviews.text: On time, excellent and thorough attention to my problem. All fixed and ready to water.

reviews.name: Eric Phillips
reviews.text: Guys were good at diagnosis  of problem and fast at work.  They checked all system and did a final spraying review.

reviews.name: Jay Hernandez
reviews.text: Fast, efficient and courteous. Appreciate their ability to work with my schedule and shift as necessary.

reviews.name: Srinivasan Prabhushankar
reviews.text: It was very fast, efficient, professional and satisfying

reviews.name: Mike Sisk
reviews.text: Great job as always, punctual and Gareth was friendly and knowledgeable!

reviews.name: William Seltzer
reviews.text:
Josh and his team were fantastic! I needed some minor valve and line repairs and my sprinkler system adjusted for summer coverage. They came out promptly, were courteous and knowledgeable, and had it taken care of in a flash.
Sprinkler Medics are reliable and friendly, just like neighbors!

reviews.name: Sharon Ivy
reviews.text:
For the last 6 years Sprinkler Medic has come to my rescue several times. My house has a sprinkler system that my husband put in. After my husband became unable to do work with the yard or anything, I needed help and Sprinkler
Medic started taking care of us with spring startup and winter shutdown and any problems in between.

I asked for help yesterday trying to figure out a new controller. Josh came to my aid on a Saturday morning I felt fairly stupid, but Josh was a complete gentleman, was patient with me and didn't let me feel stupid.

Sprinkler Medic is my go-to company

reviews.name: Greg Hodgson
reviews.text: Great job and great guys to work with.

reviews.name: J.R. Wright
reviews.text: These guys did a fantastic job! They knew exactly what they were doing and were very thorough and worked quickly!!!!

reviews.name: Bernie Wiegand
reviews.text: Fantastic they did everything i needed them to do at a very reasonable level price.

reviews.name: Kenneth Garcy
reviews.text: Chandler & Tacome did a great job and found a broken sprinkler head.

reviews.name: Marguerite Witten
reviews.text: Efficient, pleasant, on time and knowledgeable. They forgot to replace the lid to the water controls and left their tool here.

reviews.name: Patrick Davis
reviews.text: Quick response and once Gareth got to our home I could not have expected a more patient, knowledgeable and methodical approach.  He was great!

reviews.name: Rabindra Sinha
reviews.text:
It would be nice to let customers know upfront that there will be $100 service call for the appointment and also won't be waived if you do the work. You shouldn't bring this up as a surprise after giving one quote for work and then just adding $100 on top of it.
It wasn't a great experience not only on the fee side. They left with control wires and covers open which I had to arrange after they left.

reviews.name: Eric Jackson
reviews.text: Arrived right in time. Completed the job quickly and cleanly. Likely will make Sprinkler Medic my ongoing sprinkler maintenance company for all work I might need and not want to do myself .

reviews.name: Mike Hulsey
reviews.text: Guys worked hard and explained exactly what I needed.

reviews.name: ANITA HARRISON
reviews.text: Sprinkler Medic was recommended by my neighbor and I have learned once again “word of mouth” is the best advertisement. The technicians Garth & Lewis assured us of their experience, were professional in every aspect. The ask what problem we were having with the sprinkler system and diagnosis and restored our system to operating order.

reviews.name: Dwight Campbell
reviews.text: Sprinkler Medic was right now time.  Called to let us know when they would arrive.  Very professional and fix our sprinkler system in no time flat.  Keep site very clean and neat.

reviews.name: Natalie Fuller
reviews.text: Wonderful service, on time and the two young men worked very hard and explained everything to me.  Would highly recommend using Sprinkler Medic.  Thank you!

reviews.name: JT Liles
reviews.text: Awesome people and they did an awesome job, highly recommend these people if you have a problem with your sprinkler system.

reviews.name: Barry Howard
reviews.text: Very professional service that thoroughly explains the situation

reviews.name: Katia Ortega
reviews.text: Always reliable and great work.

reviews.name: Shondra Seebeck
reviews.text: Very good experience. They repaired a line and put in a shut off valve in a short amount of time. The men working on it did a great job keeping the area neat and put the grass back where they had to dig. One of the owners, Joshua, came out prior and he walked me through the process and possibilities to do to get it fixed.

reviews.name: Greg Martin
reviews.text: Gareth Duvall came out to the house today to fix one of my sprinkler heads and fix the rain gage. We did an upgrade on the system which I’m happy about. Friendly young man who has good handle on his job and knows how to speak with confidence. I reallllllly like my sprinkler medics!!!

reviews.name: Edward Teach
reviews.text: Excellent service/response to calls, a great warranty (1 year) and reasonable charges.

reviews.name: Ted Cummings
reviews.text: We appreciated Jimmy’s knowledge and quick support of our emergent issue!

reviews.name: Jon Steffens
reviews.text: Gareth is a great young man, he explained everything he did and is an asset to Sprinkler Medic.

reviews.name: Mark Stiles
reviews.text: They quickly diagnosed the problem and replaced the controller and tested it.  Also found a broken nozzle they replaced.  Tacoma and Chandler were professional and friendly.

reviews.name: Lorenzo Thomas
reviews.text: The Team at Sprinkler Medic were prompt in responding to our request for support services - they exhibited professionalism when they arrived at our home and adjusted and repaired our sprinkler system in an expeditious manner. All of this at a fair and reasonable price. I have signed on with them for annual service support and highly recommend their company.

reviews.name: Yulia Bell
reviews.text: They were on time, efficient and got the job done. A bit pricey.

reviews.name: Tim Townsend
reviews.text: Just took the repairman a while to get there but once he arrived he did an excellent job. In fact, he arrived, did the work, then knocked on the door to let me know he was through.  Cool!

reviews.name: William Cochran
reviews.text: Your team always does a great job.

reviews.name: Michele Gillies
reviews.text: The guys did a fabulous job on replacing heads and working hard on roots etc..thanks so much for getting us all fixed up.

reviews.name: Sabrina Nodal
reviews.text: Sprinkler medic came swiftly and fixed our issue. They went above and beyond to make sure we had good coverage and to fix another company’s error. Thank you Todd and Alvin! Recommend!

reviews.name: tamera balch
reviews.text: They were able to fit me in due to a leak. All 3 workers were professional and took care of the problem quickly.

reviews.name: Dennis Hendrix
reviews.text: Sprinkler Medic did an excellent job of fixing my broken sprinkler system. Highly recommend. A++++

reviews.name: John Clark
reviews.text: Gareth, arrive on time and was professional in replacing and adjusting the sprinkler that needed adjustments. He is a great access to your company and operation. He should be rewarded with an promotion and a raise. Thanks Gareth for your support and patience with taking care of my lawn.

reviews.name: Shaun
reviews.text: The techs with Sprinkler Medic are always professional, friendly and they know what they are doing. If you need someone to repair your sprinkler system, I highly recommend then.

reviews.name: Lawanna Ordway
reviews.text: Technician was professional and knowledgeable.

reviews.name: Sandra Coogan
reviews.text: Gareth was very polite and explsined every step he was going to take in repairing my leak. When he left you would never know he had been there to repair a bad leak. Thanks for the prompt visit.

reviews.name: Ramona Redden
reviews.text: Great service and prompt.

reviews.name: Karen Newman
reviews.text: Excellent job. On time. Super nice and kind. Fixed my leak. I will definitely use them again.

reviews.name: Jack Bryant
reviews.text: I have recommended these guys to several neighbors. These are the guys that you want working on your sprinkler system period.

reviews.name: Kim Moon
reviews.text: Came out and fixed my leak right away. Chandler did a great job diagnosing my problem got me up and going. Chris was easy to work with getting me scheduled quickly. Will definitely use them again with all my sprinkler needs

reviews.name: Kevin Muskett
reviews.text: Great outfit!!  Kind, courteous, and helpful.

reviews.name: Randy D. Colvin
reviews.text: Good, quick and professional.

reviews.name: Karen Burton
reviews.text: Great communication and efficiency.  Thank you.

reviews.name: kathy B
reviews.text: Received a text that sprinkler medic LLC was finished with winterizing one minute after I answered the door and he told me he didn't know where to shut off the water.

reviews.name: Eddie Mazzeo
reviews.text: The Team at sprinkler medic is second to none. If only all home service companies were at their level! Could not recommend more. I have been a customer for 3 years and they are exceptional.

reviews.name: Dave Roberts
reviews.text: Replaced some needed heads and checked all heads for coverage.  Did an excellent job as always.

reviews.name: Gregory Martin
reviews.text:
Hey Gareth! I put you some Christmas money on your tip! 🎄
You can’t beat these guys. Gareth , Josh & Chris! Sprinkler Medic has been good if not great to me and my sprinkler system. What 6 years now? You guys rock and I appreciate all the help you’ve given me through the years. Happy Holidays!!! …

reviews.name: Nancy Robertson
reviews.text: Reliable company with responsible employees. I have always had a good result with reasonable prices from Sprinkler Medic.

reviews.name: Laura Parker
reviews.text: The guys are always very nice and we have used them for a few years now.  They even put in a drain and line in our front yard to help with water issues due to driveway topography.

reviews.name: Al Patterson
reviews.text: Has my sprinkler system maintenance and winterization process on auto pilot.  Outstanding service and value!

reviews.name: nate erickson
reviews.text: Technicians were prompt and respectful

reviews.name: Amy Reed
reviews.text: Service person was prompt and knowledgeable and did a great job

reviews.name: Peg Heeschen
reviews.text: Quick and courteous service.  Recommend highly.

reviews.name: Wendy James
reviews.text: I wish all of my contractors were this responsive! They answer the phone when you call, they show up for your appointment and their work is completed in a timely manner.

reviews.name: Kevin Arflack
reviews.text: Rating service this time lacking and troubling. Was out of town when service for wintersation shut off was performed. Representative left water shut off half engaged. Wife called saying sprinkler water was running. I told her to call rep again. He came out and adjusted shut off. Also got a call from my neighbor that their house water was shut off and he had to turn it back on.. Rep accidentally turned my neighbors water off with out knowing what he had done. Need to please be more careful next time.

reviews.name: Marshall Eubanks
reviews.text: Great job- knowledgeable, efficient and professional.

reviews.name: Sandra Talley
reviews.text: As always, they got the problem fixed promptly!

reviews.name: Ali Morgan
reviews.text: We had a good experience. We learned through out increasing utility bill that we had a leak in our irrigation system. The first company I called couldn't come out for two weeks. Sprinkler Medic came out the next morning, found the leak immediately and repaired it. The price was about what I anticipated. The only thing I disagree with was being prompted to tip when paying electronically.

reviews.name: D M
reviews.text: Awesome service!

reviews.name: Jimmy Valrie
reviews.text: OUTSTANDING customer service. Technician is very knowledgeable of the sprinkler systems

reviews.name: Elaine Edwards
reviews.text: Gareth was very professional.  He completed the activation and fixed a few issues.  Looking forward to the coming watering season😎 …

reviews.name: Nancy Mohlere
reviews.text: Jimmy was courteous and checked everything very well.  We feel good about our sprinkler system and know we can call if there is ever a problem.

reviews.name: Jacquelyn Summers
reviews.text: Gareth was spectacular!  He identified some issues with our sprinklers and fixed them quickly.  He is always so pleasant and competent.

reviews.name: Brenda Rust
reviews.text: Gareth was very knowledgeable and efficient.  He checked the sprinklers to make sure they all worked.  He answered all my questions and was very nice and courteous.  Gareth represented Sprinkler Medics very well.

reviews.name: Charlie
reviews.text: Takoma kept me informed as to his arrival time, efficiently serviced the sprinkler system, fixed all issues with the system, and had a great demeanor!  Thanks!

reviews.name: Michael Thome
reviews.text: Very please with the quality of Chandler's work.  He is very polite and professional.  He identified a few things that needed fixing and then fixed them with my approval.  Sprinkler Medic is definitely our go to company for our sprinkler/irrigation needs.  Great Job!!

reviews.name: Marlene Parker
reviews.text: Chandler tested the system and was very polite and helpful in answering all my questions.

reviews.name: Kirk Wimsett
reviews.text: Very professional and got my sprinkler system working great!  Prompt and very friendly

reviews.name: George Gallo
reviews.text: Spring startup. Made adjustments, advised us on duration of each zone (plants, grass), timing, etc. Answered my dumb questions. Kept us informed on arrival time and even got there a bit early. Great service from knowledgeable folks. Will be using again.

reviews.name: Nancy Bucher
reviews.text: Very dependable, very professional. I have been using their services for years, both for installation of a new system and regularly scheduled maintenance checks, as well as fast on-call service.

reviews.name: Charlotte Ball
reviews.text: Technician(Chandler)arrived on time and introduced himself. Thoroughly checked the sprinkler system and informed me of some issues with some of the aged sprinkler heads. Repairs were done quickly and efficiently. Chandler answered all my questions. Good work!

reviews.name: Allen McDavid
reviews.text: On time and professional!

reviews.name: Adrian Jimenez
reviews.text: Sprinkler Medic showed up on time for a Spring Start-Up service,

reviews.name: John Chizmar
reviews.text: Trustworthy and dependable.  They never try to sell you unnecessary repairs or upgrades.

reviews.name: Teresa Smalley
reviews.text: Scheduled visit to start spring service.  Low water pressure revealed a leak from recent city dig to repair gutter leak from under the street.  Other sprinkler head repairs fixed promptly.  First rate service with tech Gareth explaining each step as he went.

reviews.name: Peggy Kretzer
reviews.text: Wonderful service! Thanks-

reviews.name: buy used
reviews.text: Very expensive and not completed

reviews.name: Birgit Gatlin
reviews.text: Chandler was on time and very friendly. He had to replace 2 heads that were leaking and did so very efficiently. Would highly recommend.

reviews.name: Theo Vernon
reviews.text: Gareth Duvall is very kind and thorough with his work. I appreciate him.

reviews.name: Calvin Blackwell
reviews.text: The technician was very thorough and quick. My BillPay has scheduled payment 17 Mar 2026

reviews.name: Susan Tuck
reviews.text: Have used Sprinkler Medic in the past. They always show up on time and fix any problems in a professional manner.  I highly recommend them.
